flows.name: Freelancer signs in via Google OAuth on the web application
flows.trigger: Freelancer opens the application in a browser and initiates OAuth sign-in

steps.action: Web Ingress receives the OAuth callback request and dispatches it to Identity & Auth for session resolution; CT8 session-presence check gates the authenticated route

Identity & Auth completes the Google OAuth 2.0 handshake — initiates redirect, receives callback, exchanges code for token; external boundary crossed inside C2, no CT* (external system not a modeled component)
Identity & Auth writes the Freelancer identity record (provider token and user profile reference, E1) to Data Store and reads it back on session resolution

failure_path.trigger: PostgreSQL instance unreachable when Identity & Auth attempts to persist the Freelancer identity record after OAuth callback
failure_path.arrives_at: OAuth callback cannot persist the identity record; no authenticated session is established; Web Ingress redirects the browser to the login entry point with an error
